CustomField.description: Portion of the gift that is NOT tax-deductible — the value of goods/services the donor received in return (quid pro quo, e.g. event/gala benefits). The full gift Amount remains JCRC revenue; this split is informational for receipts. JSI-86 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Value of any goods or services the donor received in return (e.g., gala dinner, event benefits). Leave blank if the entire gift is tax-deductible.
CustomField.label: Non-Deductible Amount
